base_url.description: Infor Nexus Data API (v3.1) base URL, e.g. https://mingle-portal.inforcloudsuite.com/TENANT/ns/api/v3.1. No default: legacy requires the caller to supply the tenant-scoped host.

dataset_name.description: Name of the configured Infor Nexus export dataset to read (path-escaped into /datasets/{dataset_name}).

access_key_id.description: Infor Nexus HMAC access key id. Sent verbatim on the X-Infor-AccessKeyId header and as the credential prefix of the signed Authorization header; never logged.

user_id.description: Infor Nexus user id. Sent verbatim on the X-Infor-UserId header; never logged.

secret_key.description: Infor Nexus HMAC secret key. Used only to compute the HMAC-SHA256 request signature (never sent on the wire itself, never logged).

api_key.description: Infor Nexus Data API key. Sent verbatim on the X-Infor-ApiKey header; never logged.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound for the modifiedSince query filter on the first sync (superseded by the persisted incremental cursor on subsequent syncs).

mode.description: Set to "fixture" to emit deterministic canned records with no network access (test/conformance-harness affordance only, never set in production).
